title: Home | IIM Calcutta
meta_description: The Indian Institute of Management Calcutta (IIMC) was established as the first national institute for Post-Graduate studies and Research in Management by the Government of India
text_content: Welcome To IIM Calcutta ESTD. 1961 Explore More Announcements Shortlisted Candidates (List Out) for the Executive Ph. D. - Admission Selection Process for the Academic Year (AY) 2026-27. Shortlisted Candidates (List Out) for the regular Doctoral Programme (Ph. D.) - Admission Interview(s) 2026. Candidates Shortlisted for Personal Interview (Round 3)-MBAEx Batch 20 (2026-27) Call for "Faculty" Positions at IIM Calcutta IIM Calcutta at a Glance # 0 First IIM of India # 0 No.1 in BT-MDRA Best B-School Survey 2024 # 0 First Triple Accredited Institute in India # 45000 Total Number of Alumni 1961 1961 14 November 1961. IIM Calcutta Incorporated. The first IIM of India 1968 1968 15 Dec 1968. Foundation stone laid at Joka Campus 2011 2011 Golden Jubilee. 14 Nov 2011 IIM Calcutta completes 50 glorious years 2016 2016 1st Triple Crown Business school in India AMBA, AACSB & EQUIS India's Only CEMS Partner A Triple Accredited Institution Take a Virtual Tour Explore Joka Academics at IIM Calcutta Doctoral Programme The Doctoral Programme of the Indian Institute of Management Calcutta was started in 1971. It is a full-time doctoral programme that offers students opportunities for advanced studies and research in different specializations related to Management Science. The Programme aims to prepare students for careers in teaching and research in management studies and in related disciplines, and for careers in the government, in industry, and in other organizations that require advanced analytical and research capabilities. MBA Designed to train students to become excellent general managers and high-level-decision-makers with broad strategic vision, this full-time two year residential Programme views management as an integrated process and helps students develop a global view and respond effectively to changes in the economic, technological, cultural and political environments. Specific skills in areas such as accounting, finance, marketing, operations, and management lie at the heart of the course. MBAEx MBA for Executives Programme is IIM Calcutta's One Year Full Time Residential Programme meant for Executives with more than five years of professional experience. IIM Calcutta is the first management institute in the country to be Triple Crowned – to be accredited by AACSB, AMBA and EQUIS, i.e., accredited by all the three major accreditation agencies in the world for management education. Only 5 other business schools in Asia and 73 business schools around the world are currently ‘Triple Accredited’. CEMS MIM Programme In its endeavour to become a global institution, and as a step towards achieving its vision of becoming an ‘International Centre of Excellence in Management Education’ IIMC has joined CEMS, an elite club of 30 premier business schools from across the world, as an Academic partner. IIMC is the only Indian member of this renowned alliance of leading global business schools and multinational corporations. Collaborative Programmes PGDBA The Post Graduate Diploma in Business Analytics (PGDBA) – jointly offered by IIM Calcutta, IIT Kharagpur, and ISI – aims to help shape the emerging profession of business analytics by delivering a cutting edge... PGPEX-VLM The mission of the PGPEX-VLM is to develop future visionary leaders for the manufacturing sector in India so as to enhance the global competitiveness of our manufacturing sector. Executive Education Programmes Our Executive Education Programmes are designed to equip working professionals with Strategic and Leadership acumen as well as evolving skills like AI, Analytics and Innovation Management Development Programmes PharmaLeap – Executive Management Program for Future Pharma Leaders 25-28 th May 2026 Innovation Leadership: AI powered Design and Agile Thinking 08-12 th June 2026 Why Smart Leaders Make Bad Decisions? – Insights and Solutions from Behavioral Economics 08-12 th June 2026 Gen AI: Implementing Enterprise Level Applications 29-02 nd June 2026 VIEW ALL Long Duration Programmes EdLEAP: Education Leaders' Programme June 2026 Advanced Programme in Strategic Leadership Communication (APSLC) April 2026 Chief Financial Officer Programme (CFO) May 2026 Executive Programme in Corporate Sustainability (EPCS) May 2026 VIEW ALL For Custom Programmes , please write to custom_mdp[at]iimcal[dot]ac[dot]in Experience Located in Joka, IIM Calcutta offers an environment in which our students and faculty can focus on intellectual and personal growth as a close-knit community. IIMC campus includes world-class teaching infrastructure and academic buildings designed and continually updated to facilitate learning. Events 11th Research Summer School 2026 May 4-9, 2026 11th Research Summer School 2026 Self-Enhancement Goals and Corporate Transgressions Date: 18 March 2026 Self-Enhancement Goals and Corporate Transgressions IIM Calcutta Economics Research Conference 2026 March 13-14, 2026 IIM Calcutta Economics Research Conference 2026 Featured Videos WeatherBeater™ Product Video X-act Contour® Product Video GearBox® Product Video Mud Guards Product Video Wheel Well Guards Product Video Cargo Liner Product Video Husky Liners Products Custom Molded Mud Guards Custom Molded Mud Guards Custom Molded Mud Guards Custom Molded Mud Guards Custom Molded Mud Guards Custom Molded Mud Guards Custom Molded Mud Guards Custom Molded Mud Guards Custom Molded Mud Guards Custom Molded Mud Guards Custom Molded Mud Guards Custom Molded Mud Guards Centres of Excellence Management Centre For Human Values (MCHV) Management Centre For Human Values (MCHV) MCHV enshrines more than two decades of aspiration and effort to hold up to the members of human organizations and institutions - in India and elsewhere - contemporary adaptations from the perennial corpus of Indian Psycho - Philosophical wisdom. Centre For Development And Environment Policy (CDEP) Centre For Development And Environment Policy (CDEP) Supported by a core endowment provided by the Indian Planning Commission, the Centre for Development and Environment Policy (CDEP) had been established in 1998 as an interdisciplinary platform of the Indian Institute of Management Calcutta. Centre For Entrepreneurship And Innovation (CEI) Center for Entrepreneurship and Innovation (CEI) Center for Entrepreneurship and Innovation (CEI) is one of the centers of excellence established by Indian Institute of Management (IIM) Calcutta to achieve greater understanding of an effective mechanism for promotion of professional management practices in Indian organizations, as well as to stimulate the development of these organizations for societal benefit. CEI’s vision is to be acknowledged as a program of international renown, where students, faculty, alumni, industry and policy makers collaborate, learn and innovate. Prof. Aditi Bhutoria is currently the Coordinator and the other members of the CEI committee are Prof. Balram Avittathur, Prof. Vimal Kumar M and Dr. Subhrangshu Sanyal (CEO, IIMC Innovation Park) Centre For Corporate Governance Centre For Corporate Governance (CCG) The Indian Institute of Management Calcutta has set up the Centre for Corporate Governance(CCG) to create and disseminate knowledge in the area of corporate governance. Finance Lab Finance Lab The Financial Research and Trading Lab (FRTL) at IIM Calcutta was set up in November 2008 to undertake cutting edge research on financial markets using real time high frequency data from financial markets of India and around the world. In 2011, the grant from the Government of India of Rs. 20 crore helped the Lab grow into a world-class centre of excellence. IIM Calcutta Case Research Center (IIMCCRC) IIM Calcutta Case Research Center (IIMCCRC) The IIM Calcutta Case Research Center (IIMCCRC) is set up to develop a repository of teaching cases and notes that can be used by Faculty of Business Schools in India and abroad.
